01 /
About

More
About
Me

4+ Years Experience
10M+ Project Visits
Mid/High Poly Specialist
Roblox Environment Dev
Who I Am

I'm a Roblox developer and builder with over 4 years of experience creating environments on the platform. Over that time, I've contributed to projects that have collectively reached 10+ million visits, mainly focusing on building detailed worlds that make games feel more immersive and alive.

My main focus is mid-poly and high-poly environments, where I try to balance visual quality with performance so the builds not only look great but also run smoothly in-game. I've worked on a variety of projects over the years, from stylized maps to more detailed and complex environments.

02 / Experience

Previous
Roles

These studios are Roblox-based tech companies that sell Roblox assets on websites like BuiltByBit, and also work directly with developers.

I was previously hired by these companies to manage teams and develop assets for them until I retired from these companies in 2024.
Zoom Studios
Corporate Officer
Leadership & team management within a Roblox asset development studio.
Management
Pulse
Dep. Manager
Department oversight, asset quality control, and cross-team coordination.
Management
Hawk Development
Developer
Designed and built Roblox environment assets and maps for client projects.
Development
YGS Studios
Moderator
Community moderation and contributor standards for a Roblox development studio.
Community
ℹ

All of the above roles were held within Roblox-based studios until my retirement from these companies in 2024. I now focus on independent freelance environment development.
